journal_entry.description: Factory staff meal charged to manufacturing overhead
journal_entry.rationale: Meal for production staff is a manufacturing overhead cost, accumulated in Manufacturing Overhead (asset/inventory account) until allocated to production. Corporate credit card creates a liability. Food is generally HST-exempt in Canada (basic groceries), so no HST is recorded.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Manufacturing overhead increases (asset account that will be allocated to WIP/inventory), corporate credit card liability increases. Meals are typically HST-exempt as food, so no tax line added.

output_credit_classifier.reason: Manufacturing overhead increases (asset account that will be allocated to WIP/inventory), corporate credit card liability increases. Meals are typically HST-exempt as food, so no tax line added.
